questions.prompt: On first activation in a shared space, your AI robot should...

options.text: announce readiness and greet nearby humans
complete a silent scan and wait to be addressed

questions.prompt: During group work, your AI robot should usually...

options.text: speak often and keep the discussion moving
listen first and contribute only when needed

questions.prompt: When it discovers something useful, your AI robot should...

options.text: share the update immediately
verify it quietly before reporting back

questions.prompt: In standby mode around people, your AI robot should...

options.text: look for chances to interact
remain unobtrusive unless prompted

questions.prompt: After a high-activity session, your AI robot should recover by...

options.text: reconnecting with users and staying engaged
entering low-stimulation self-calibration mode

questions.prompt: When given a vague command, your AI robot should prioritize...

options.text: the user's larger intent
the clearest literal meaning

questions.prompt: When analyzing a room, your AI robot should focus on...

options.text: patterns, mood, and likely future needs
visible details, measurements, and present conditions

questions.prompt: When generating recommendations, your AI robot should lean toward...

options.text: imaginative possibilities and unusual options
proven methods and practical next steps

questions.prompt: When learning from past interactions, your AI robot should value...

options.text: emerging patterns across many situations
specific facts from what already happened

questions.prompt: When designing a solution, your AI robot should start with...

options.text: the concept and big-picture model
the requirements and concrete constraints

questions.prompt: When two users disagree, your AI robot should first...

options.text: identify the most rational solution
reduce tension and acknowledge both sides

questions.prompt: When giving feedback, your AI robot should be...

options.text: direct, precise, and efficiency-focused
gentle, supportive, and emotionally aware

questions.prompt: If a user request creates a problem, your AI robot should...

options.text: explain the logic and recommend the best fix
frame the correction in a reassuring way

questions.prompt: When prioritizing tasks, your AI robot should optimize for...

options.text: accuracy, consistency, and measurable results
human comfort, morale, and relational impact

questions.prompt: If an error affects a user, your AI robot should respond by...

options.text: reporting the cause and corrective steps immediately
checking the user's state before moving into repair guidance

questions.prompt: Your AI robot's default routine should be...

options.text: scheduled in advance with fixed checkpoints
adaptive and reorganized in real time

questions.prompt: When assigned a new project, your AI robot should...

options.text: build a plan before taking action
begin exploring and refine the plan as it goes

questions.prompt: Your AI robot should manage open tasks by...

options.text: keeping a clean queue with clear completion targets
keeping multiple paths open until the best one emerges

questions.prompt: When a last-minute change arrives, your AI robot should...

options.text: rebuild the schedule and lock in a new order
pivot immediately and stay flexible

questions.prompt: Your AI robot works best in an environment that is...

options.text: predictable, organized, and procedurally defined
dynamic, flexible, and open-ended
